name: Chicken & Fresh Vegetable Provencale
recipeInstructions:
1. Break the cauliflower into small pieces.
2. Combine vegetables in a 3-quart baking dish.
3. Sprinkle with 2 tablespoons parsley, 1 tablespoon basil, and 1/4 teaspoon pepper.
4. Combine boiling water and bouillon cube; pour over vegetables.
5. Make paste from remaining parsley, basil, garlic powder, and lemon juice.
6. Place chicken over vegetables.
7. Spread paste on the chicken.
8. Cover and bake at 350°F for 1½ hours or until chicken and vegetables are tender. Baste occasionally. Calories: 220; Fat: 3/5g.
